title: Rares
description: Unlock the allure of exclusivity with rare treasures only server admins can bestow!
body:
Unveiling the magic and exclusivity of rare items! Inspired by the iconic rarity of Runescape partyhats, the Minecraft Rares Mod introduces an assortment of prestigious items. These treasures are not to be mined, crafted, or stumbled upon in your world. Their allure lies in their rarity: they can only be granted by the benevolent or sometimes mischievous server admins.

## Spawning Party Crackers:

**Permanent Party Cracker:**
To give yourself a Party Cracker, use the following command:
```
/give @p rares:party_cracker
```

**Temporary Party Cracker:**
To give yourself a Temporary Party Cracker, use the following command:
```
/give @p rares:temporary_party_cracker
```

## Spawning Specific Party Hats:

If you wish to spawn a specific color of party hat, use the following command, replacing `COLOR` with the desired color:

```
/give @p rares:COLOR_partyhat
```

For example, to give yourself a blue party hat:

```
/give @p rares:blue_partyhat
```

**Temporary Party Hats:**
For temporary versions of the hats, prepend `temporary_` to the color:

```
/give @p rares:temporary_COLOR_partyhat
```

For instance, to get a temporary blue party hat:

```
/give @p rares:temporary_blue_partyhat
```

## Removing Temporary Items:

If you're an admin and wish to remove temporary hats and crackers from all players' inventories, use the following command:

```
/cleartemporaryitems
```

This command will clear out any temporary party hats and crackers.


### Available Party Hat Colors & Rarities

| Available Colors | Color Names    | Rarities       |
|------------------|----------------|----------------|
| Gold             | `gold`         | Extremely Rare |
| Black            | `black`        | Ultra Rare     |
| Dark Gray        | `dark_gray`    | Ultra Rare     |
| Gray             | `gray`         | Ultra Rare     |
| Blue             | `blue`         | Very Rare      |
| Dark Blue        | `dark_blue`    | Very Rare      |
| White            | `white`        | Rare           |
| Red              | `red`          | Uncommon       |
| Dark Red         | `dark_red`     | Uncommon       |
| Green            | `green`        | Common         |
| Dark Green       | `dark_green`   | Common         |
| Yellow           | `yellow`       | Common         |
| Light Purple     | `light_purple` | Standard       |
| Dark Purple      | `dark_purple`  | Standard       |
| Aqua             | `aqua`         | Standard       |
| Dark Aqua        | `dark_aqua`    | Standard       |
